CustomField.description: The 'Rate Based on' field specifies which rate to use for the calculation. Selecting the 'Rate' option will use the rate value for the MR calculation, while selecting the 'Ratio/Matrix Table' option will use the interpolated value from the respective ratio/matrix table for the MR calculation. Either the rate or ratio/matrix table is mandatory, depending on the option chosen in this field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The 'Rate Based on' field specifies which rate to use for the calculation. Selecting the 'Rate' option will use the rate value for the MR calculation, while selecting the 'Ratio/Matrix Table' option will use the interpolated value from the respective ratio/matrix table for the MR calculation. Either the rate or ratio/matrix table is mandatory, depending on the option chosen in this field.
CustomField.label: Rate Based On
